description: Debug your Container and Kubernetes workloads with an AI interface

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-m6hq-p25p-ffr2 in github.com/containerd/containerd@1.7.28
findings.recommendation: Upgrade github.com/containerd/containerd to a version that resolves GHSA-m6hq-p25p-ffr2. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-m6hq-p25p-ffr2 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
